events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist Brian May celebrates his 79th birthday today.

angles.name: Guitar God
angles.copy: Happy 79th birthday to the iconic Brian May! His groundbreaking guitar work with Queen continues to inspire generations.

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones' charismatic frontman, Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday today.

angles.name: Still Rolling
angles.copy: Eighty-three years young and still commanding the stage! Wishing a very happy birthday to the one and only Mick Jagger.

events.title: MTV launched in the US
events.blurb: Forty-five years ago today, MTV launched in the United States with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its first broadcast music video.

angles.name: Video Killed The Radio Star
angles.copy: Remember when music television changed everything? Forty-five years since MTV launched, transforming how we consumed music forever.

events.title: Woodstock Festival anniversary
events.blurb: Fifty-seven years ago today, the legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair began in Bethel, New York, drawing hundreds of thousands for '3 Days of Peace & Music'.

angles.name: Peace & Music
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years since the iconic Woodstock festival. A moment in history that truly defined a generation.

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's passing
events.blurb: Today marks the 49th anniversary of the death of the King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley, who passed away in 1977.

angles.name: Remembering The King
angles.copy: Remembering the incomparable Elvis Presley, 49 years since we lost the King of Rock and Roll. His music lives on.

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders' iconic frontwoman, Chrissie Hynde, celebrates her 75th birthday today.

angles.name: Pretenders Legend
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the legendary Chrissie Hynde. Her distinctive voice and songwriting continue to rock.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Oasis and Beady Eye frontman Liam Gallagher celebrates his 54th birthday today.

angles.name: Rock 'n' Roll Star
angles.copy: Happy 54th birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher. The voice of a generation, still delivering pure rock 'n' roll.

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: Today is James Bond Day, marking the anniversary of the world premiere of the first 007 film, Dr. No, in 1962.

angles.name: Shaken, Not Stirred
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! Celebrating over six decades of espionage, iconic soundtracks, and timeless style.

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Remembering John Lennon, who would have celebrated his 86th birthday today. The legendary Beatle was born in Liverpool in 1940.

angles.name: Imagine Peace
angles.copy: On what would have been his 86th birthday, we remember the profound musical legacy and message of peace from John Lennon.

events.title: John Cleese turns 87
events.blurb: The celebrated British comedian, actor, and writer John Cleese, known for Monty Python and Fawlty Towers, celebrates his 87th birthday today.

angles.name: Ministry of Silly Walks
angles.copy: Happy 87th birthday to the comedic genius, John Cleese! From Python to Fawlty, his unique humour remains timeless.
